project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with shadcn/ui, freemium SaaS
verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` for type checking and `npm run build` to verify the Next.js build succeeds
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Vercel KV used for Pro subscription verification. No Docker setup in project.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: shadcn/ui components, Tailwind CSS, lucide-react icons, freemium gating with blur overlay + Lock icon + Upgrade CTA

key_patterns.rate_limiting: In-memory Map with daily reset, check before API call, increment after successful response. See app/api/solar/insights/route.ts
key_patterns.pro_verification: Server-side email-based check via getSubscriptionByEmail() from lib/kv-store.ts
key_patterns.client_pro_status: useProStatus() hook from lib/hooks/useProStatus.ts returns { isPro, isLoading, proEmail }
key_patterns.freemium_ui: blur-sm + pointer-events-none on Pro content, absolute overlay with Lock icon + Upgrade CTA. See SolarAnalyzer.tsx
key_patterns.page_structure: Metadata export, AdContainer placements, responsive container layout with max-w-4xl or max-w-5xl
key_patterns.api_routes: Next.js route handlers at app/api/*/route.ts using NextRequest/NextResponse
key_patterns.geocoding: Nominatim OpenStreetMap used in SolarAnalyzer for free geocoding
key_patterns.components_location: components/features/ for feature components, components/calculators/ for calculator components
key_patterns.ads: AdContainer component with slotId prop, placed at strategic locations
key_patterns.city_pages: app/solar-roi/[city]/page.tsx uses generateStaticParams, US_CITIES and INDIAN_CITIES arrays

directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes; components/ - UI (shadcn), features, calculators, ads, layouts, premium; lib/ - utilities, hooks, contexts, data files; lib/pseo-data/ - city data for pSEO pages
